record.summary: The rauthy driver's full browser round-trip (SPA -> same-origin /auth proxy -> rauthy login UI -> OIDC callback -> app session cookie) has been exercised by hand but never by an automated end-to-end test; this was the standing owed item from the enrahi phase close-out. This spec adds a Playwright-driven e2e that boots the app plus the dev rauthy (docker compose, spec 005), completes a real password login in a real browser engine, and asserts the session, profile, and logout behavior. Kept out of the default verify verb; runs as its own npm script and an optional scheduled CI job.
record.title: End-to-end rauthy login validation (browser-real)
